list.name: Shot in the Back and Fall
Lie on Chair, Sunbathe and Sleep
Male Run Forward Pick Up Left
Female Crouch Pick Up Place Side
Female Run Forward Pick Up Right
Female Crouch Pick Fruit Basket Stand
Female Crouch Pick Gun Point Forward
Female Bend Over Pick Up Inspect
Female Walk Pick Put in Pocket
Talk with Left Hand on Hip
Walking Scan with Sudden Look Back
Sit Hands on Head Lean Back
Kneel on One Knee and Stand
Relax Arms, Then Strike Battle Pose
Jump with Arms and Legs Open
Sword and Shield Alert Turn Left
Sword and Shield Alert Turn Right
